parameters.jsCode:
const batchId = $('Resolve Batch Id').first().json.batch_id;
const sql = `WITH best_contact AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (CONCAT(rc."First name", ' ', rc."Last name"))
    CONCAT(rc."First name", ' ', rc."Last name") AS payer_name,
    rc."First name" AS first_name,
    rc."Last name" AS last_name,
    NULLIF(TRIM(rc."Email address"), '') AS email_address,
    NULLIF(TRIM(rc."Address 1"), '') AS address_1,
    NULLIF(TRIM(rc."Address 2"), '') AS address_2,
    NULLIF(TRIM(rc.town), '') AS town,
    NULLIF(TRIM(rc.postcode), '') AS postcode
  FROM public.raw_contacts rc
  ORDER BY CONCAT(rc."First name", ' ', rc."Last name"),
           CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(rc."Address 1"), '') IS NOT NULL AND NULLIF(TRIM(rc.postcode), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
           CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(rc."Email address"), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
           CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(rc.postcode), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
),
best_member AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (CONCAT(rm."First name", ' ', rm."Last name"))
    CONCAT(rm."First name", ' ', rm."Last name") AS payer_name,
    rm."First name" AS first_name,
    rm."Last name" AS last_name,
    NULLIF(TRIM(rm."Email address"), '') AS email_address
  FROM public.raw_members rm
  ORDER BY CONCAT(rm."First name", ' ', rm."Last name"),
           CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(rm."Email address"), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
)
SELECT
  s.batch_id,
  s.payer,
  COALESCE(bc.first_name, bm.first_name, split_part(s.payer, ' ', 1)) AS first_name,
  COALESCE(bc.last_name, bm.last_name, NULLIF(regexp_replace(s.payer, '^\\S+\\s*', ''), '')) AS last_name,
  COALESCE(bc.email_address, bm.email_address) AS email_address,
  bc.address_1,
  bc.address_2,
  bc.town,
  bc.postcode,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE s.product = '6. Parent 2026')::int AS parent_tags,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE s.product NOT IN ('6. Parent 2026', 'b. Pavilion Key', 'a. Social 2026'))::int AS regular_tags,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE s.product = 'b. Pavilion Key')::int AS keys,
  COUNT(*)::int AS total_items
FROM public.member_signups s
LEFT JOIN best_contact bc
  ON s.payer = bc.payer_name
LEFT JOIN best_member bm
  ON s.payer = bm.payer_name
WHERE s.batch_id = ${batchId}
  AND s.product <> 'a. Social 2026'
GROUP BY
  s.batch_id,
  s.payer,
  COALESCE(bc.first_name, bm.first_name, split_part(s.payer, ' ', 1)),
  COALESCE(bc.last_name, bm.last_name, NULLIF(regexp_replace(s.payer, '^\\S+\\s*', ''), '')),
  COALESCE(bc.email_address, bm.email_address),
  bc.address_1,
  bc.address_2,
  bc.town,
  bc.postcode
HAVING COALESCE(bc.email_address, bm.email_address) IS NOT NULL
   AND (
     NULLIF(TRIM(bc.address_1), '') IS NULL
     OR NULLIF(TRIM(bc.postcode), '') IS NULL
   )
ORDER BY s.payer;`;
return [{ json: { batch_id: batchId, sql } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { message: `No recipients without postal addresses for batch ${$json.batch_id}`, batch_id: $json.batch_id, sent_count: 0, recipients: [] } }}
